productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Sports Blue Sports Shoes
description: For all those soccer fans out there who love hard ground games, here's that fab shoe specially made for you! The Predator Absolion TRX HG shoe is packed with technology that can up your speed and make you a winner in style.UpperSynthetic leather upper with a rounded toe region for absolute comfort, durability and better ball feelPadded tongue, collar and inner fabric lining for a snug, comfortable FitAsymmetrical lace-up system for a snug, customised fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleEVA insole for ultimate comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsoleTextured Hard Ground cleats engineered with Traxion technology to reduce stud pressure and enhance performanceShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
